candidates.why: The only visible amortisation-labelled row is 'Goodwill Amortisation', but it is not labelled as cost of sales / cost of products / cost of services related D&A, and it does not clearly sit as a separate COGS-side D&A line relative to the selected COGS rows ('Cost of sales of products' and 'Cost of services and other'). It also has no visible values in the preview. To avoid double counting, no COGS D&A row should be added separately.

variables.notes: No explicit operating depreciation/amortisation row tied to COGS is visible in the excerpt.

candidates.why: The only visible amortisation-labelled row is 'Goodwill Amortisation', but it is not clearly an SG&A / overhead / R&D D&A line relative to the selected XSGA bucket ('Selling, General and Administrative Expenses' plus 'Non-order related research and development expenses'). It has no visible values and is not presented as a same-level SG&A or R&D D&A add-back line. Conservatively, no separate XSGA D&A row should be added.

variables.notes: No explicit operating depreciation/amortisation row tied to SG&A or R&D is visible in the excerpt.
